summary: Email Sequences (Autopilot) feature fully tested. All 27 backend API tests passed including sequence CRUD, step CRUD, manual enrollment/stop, auto-enrollment on quote send, auto-stop on quote accept, auto-stop on portal message, new user signup seeding default sequence, duplicate enrollment prevention, and auth isolation.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing for signup sequence seeding verification. Test sequences and enrollments created and cleaned up during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Sequences (Autopilot) feature is complete and working. Key APIs: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/sequences, POST /api/sequences/:id/steps, PATCH/DELETE /api/sequences/steps/:stepId, POST /api/sequences/:id/enroll/:leadId, POST /api/sequences/enrollments/:id/stop. Auto-triggers: QUOTE_SENT enrolls lead, quote accept and portal message stop enrollments. Default 'Quote Follow-Up' sequence (Day 3, 7, 10) is seeded on new user signup. Cron runs processSequences() every hour.

features_tested.GET /api/sequences: PASSED - List all sequences with step counts and enrollment stats
features_tested.GET /api/sequences/:id: PASSED - Get sequence detail with steps and enrollments (50 most recent)
features_tested.POST /api/sequences: PASSED - Create new sequence with steps, validation errors on missing name/trigger
features_tested.PATCH /api/sequences/:id: PASSED - Update sequence name, description, active toggle
features_tested.DELETE /api/sequences/:id: PASSED - Delete sequence cascades to steps and enrollments
features_tested.POST /api/sequences/:id/steps: PASSED - Add step to existing sequence
features_tested.PATCH /api/sequences/steps/:stepId: PASSED - Update step subject, body, delayDays
features_tested.POST /api/sequences/:id/enroll/:leadId: PASSED - Manual enrollment creates enrollment with nextEmailAt calculated from first step
features_tested.POST /api/sequences/enrollments/:id/stop: PASSED - Stop enrollment with custom reason
features_tested.Duplicate enrollment prevention: PASSED - Returns 400 'Lead already enrolled' on duplicate
features_tested.Auto-enrollment on quote send: PASSED - Sending quote triggers QUOTE_SENT enrollment (verified via logs)
features_tested.Auto-stop on quote accept: PASSED - Quote acceptance stops all active enrollments for lead (logs show: Stopped 2 sequence(s))
features_tested.Auto-stop on portal message: PASSED - Client portal message stops all active enrollments (logs show: Stopped 1 sequence(s) ... Client responded)
features_tested.New user signup seeds default sequence: PASSED - 'Quote Follow-Up' sequence created with 3 steps (Day 3, 7, 10)
features_tested.Auth isolation: PASSED - Users cannot access/delete other users' sequences (returns 404)

sequence_engine_logs: [Seq] Stopped 2 sequence(s) for lead ...: Quote accepted
[Seq] Stopped 1 sequence(s) for lead ...: Client responded

mocked_apis.note: Email sending is logged to console, not actually sent via Resend (per agent context)
